ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Code of the country involved in the transaction */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Commodity code of the traded item */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport (e.g., sea, air, land) */,
  "quantity_gen1" INTEGER /* Quantity of the traded item in the first general category */,
  "quantity_gen2" INTEGER /* Quantity of the traded item in the second general category */,
  "value_gen" INTEGER /* Value of the traded item in the general category */,
  "value_vessel" INTEGER /* Value of the traded item via vessel */,
  "weight_vessel" INTEGER /* Weight of the traded item via vessel */,
  "value_air" INTEGER /* Value of the traded item via air */,
  "weight_air" INTEGER /* Weight of the traded item via air */,
  "commodity_level" TEXT /* Level of the commodity code (e.g., HS10) */,
  "import_export_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating import or export (e.g., 'import', 'export') */,
  "transaction_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_weight" INTEGER /* Total weight of the transaction */,
  "customs_clearance_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was cleared by customs */,
  "customs_office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customs office that cleared the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency used for the transaction value */,
  "incoterm" TEXT /* International Commercial Terms (e.g., FOB, CIF) */,
  "trade_agreement" TEXT /* Code or name of the trade agreement under which the transaction took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_mode_of_transport FOREIGN KEY ("mode_of_transport") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_transactions_commodity_code FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_code") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_alpha2_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  "iso_alpha3_code" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "iso_numeric_code" TEXT /* Three-digit ISO 3166-1 numeric country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" INTEGER /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_code" INTEGER /* Commodity code */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "commodity_level" TEXT /* Level of the commodity code (e.g., HS10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System (HS) code for the commodity */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Standard unit of measure for the commodity */,
  "import_duty_rate" REAL /* Import duty rate for the commodity */,
  "export_duty_rate" REAL /* Export duty rate for the commodity */,
  "trade_restriction" TEXT /* Any trade restrictions or regulations for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport mode (e.g., Sea, Air, Land) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport mode */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the transport mode */,
  "average_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of the transport mode */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (e.g., in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES trade_transactions ("transaction_id")
)
